name: noon
text: **Good afternoon!** Don't push yourself too hard, okay?

name: evening
text: Good evening... you worked hard today.

name: night
text: Oh, it's already this late... get some good rest.

name: birthday_1
text:
H-Happy Birthday...! **{nickname}**
Hehe... today is a very special day.

name: birthday_2
text:
As for me...
I hope you can smile more every day.

name: firstday_1
text:
U-Um...
Do you remember what day today is? {nickname}

name: firstday_2
text: Today is the day we first met.

name: firstday_3
text:
Eh... you remember?
I'm really happy...!

name: firstday_4
text: Being able to remember it like this, I feel... it's really precious.

name: music_random1_1
text: This song feels very special, I like it.
